title: OperatorOS Workspace Catalog (v0.7.0+)
description: Durable, content-hash inventory of Workspace artifacts. Schema intentionally excludes any usage/telemetry/access tracking (per design brief).

indexed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the catalog was generated.

entries.description: One entry per file, directory, or symlink under the workspace root.

path.description: Path relative to workspace root. No leading or trailing slash.

mtime.description: Last modification time of the artifact.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of file contents. Empty string for directories or symlinks. Omit for ephemeral fields is impossible — schema enforces present.

indexed_at.description: Per-entry indexed timestamp (catalog generation time). All entries in one catalog share the same indexed_at as the top-level field, but the schema carries it per-entry so partial rebuilds remain self-describing.
